content:
Yippee! Today is National Coffee Day– my Husband’s favorite holiday! He’s quite the coffee addict… err… lover. We will celebrate this morning with a few cups in our kitchen and later with a FREE cup from Dunkin! All Dunkin Donuts are giving away a free cup of their new Dark Roast, which sounds pretty great to me!

Don’t like Dunkin? There are other places giving away coffee in honor of the day too!

McDonalds is giving a small cup of coffee to each customer during the morning hours.

Krispy Kreme customers can get a free 12 ounce hot coffee.

Peet’s Coffee & Tea is giving it’s customers a second cup of joe free when they buy the first one.

Starbucks is giving away free tastings of it’s coffee titled “Ethiopia,” which is the birthplace of coffee production! If you buy a bag of said coffee, you also will get an Ethiopia Tasting Cup for free too!

How will you be celebrating National Coffee Day?
